title: Pet Policy FAQ for Hotels in Egypt
question: What is the pet policy for guests staying at hotels in Egypt?
answer: Our hotel welcomes pets to ensure a comfortable stay for all guests. We allow small to medium-sized pets, with a maximum of two pets per room. A non-refundable cleaning fee is applied per pet, per stay. Pets must be kept on a leash in public areas and are not allowed in the F&B outlets or pool area. Guests are responsible for any damage caused by their pets. Please contact the front desk for more details or specific inquiries regarding our pet-friendly accommodations.
